ddls:
CREATE TABLE "delegates" (
  "delegate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegate */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the delegate */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the delegate */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county of the delegate */,
  "curriculum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the curriculum area the delegate is involved in */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the award received by the delegate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the delegate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the delegate */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the delegate joined the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the delegate (e.g., active, inactive, graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delegate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegates_curriculum_id FOREIGN KEY ("curriculum_id") REFERENCES curriculums ("curriculum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegates_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curriculums" (
  "curriculum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curriculum area */,
  "curriculum_area" TEXT /* Name of the curriculum area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the curriculum area */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the curriculum in months */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor responsible for the curriculum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curriculum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_curriculums_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., academic, participation, leadership) */,
  "value" REAL /* Monetary value of the award, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coordinator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* When the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delegate_award_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award history record */,
  "delegate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delegate receiving the award */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award given */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was given */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the award */,
  "awarded_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who awarded the delegate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegate_award_history_awarded_by FOREIGN KEY ("awarded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegate_award_history_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegate_award_history_delegate_id FOREIGN KEY ("delegate_id") REFERENCES delegates ("delegate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
